achievements: Developed and operated mobile (Flutter) for a blockchain-based NFT gift card e-commerce app
Gradually applied Riverpod focusing on new features within the existing Provider-based architecture, separating state and logic

Designed and implemented core commerce domain logic (purchase, gifting, exchange): Designed and implemented various commerce scenarios including regular purchases, gifting (with message cards), and item exchanges
Tracked and analyzed crashes/runtime issues using Sentry, managing fixes and verification through to production
Deployed test builds and supported QA via TestFlight / Firebase App Distribution (release/deployment management, feedback integration)
Implemented iOS/Android permission and contacts native integration (Flutter MethodChannel) and WebView JS Bridge-based app routing
Developed and operated mobile apps targeting Philippines Cebu local government/enterprises/tourists at a blockchain startup
Migrated existing iOS (Swift) and Android (Kotlin) apps to Flutter, reducing maintenance costs
Participated in planning and design processes during the initial project phase, refining requirements
Collaborated with the CS team to prioritize user complaints and bugs for rapid improvement
Operated Jenkins-based automated build/test and weekly deployment cycles
Managed multi-department/multi-person (~17 members) collaboration and schedule/issue tracking using Asana/Notion

motivation.content:
During the development of cryptocurrency wallet and commerce apps, I designed architectures suited to data characteristics by separately applying REST and WebSocket.
Based on this experience, I am applying to contribute in environments where stable data processing and user experience are critical.

selfIntroduction.content: I led the Flutter migration and structural redesign of Android native apps, performing state management and rendering optimization for blockchain wallet and commerce services. I am a developer who analyzes problems based on data and resolves them in verifiable ways within production environments.

poppop.title: PopPop
poppop.description: Gift Card NFT Trading and Commerce App
poppop.fullDescription: A platform where users can purchase, exchange, and gift various gift cards.

problemSolvings.problem: In the existing MVC pattern, the UI and business logic were tightly coupled, causing UI code to be affected whenever payment logic was modified.
problemSolvings.solution: Introduced Riverpod + ViewModel pattern to strictly separate UI and logic. Managed payment logic as a separate Provider to improve maintainability.
problemSolvings.conclusion: Gained a deep understanding of the importance of state management patterns through this project.

problemSolvings.problem: Scroll jank occurred on list screens that loaded many images, degrading user experience.
problemSolvings.solution: Integrated cached_network_image with a dedicated image resizing cache server to optimize scroll performance to 60fps.
problemSolvings.conclusion: Gained experience in building stable payment systems even under high traffic conditions.

problemSolvings.problem: Feature expansion was difficult due to complex state management.
problemSolvings.solution: Modularized state management logic to maximize reusability.
problemSolvings.conclusion: Achieved a crash rate reduction to under 0.1% after refactoring.

achievements: Migrated from Provider-based state management (designed around wallet) to Riverpod to address structural limitations caused by commerce domain expansion, building a consistent architecture for complex state flows

Identified business logic tightly coupled to a specific payment provider during payment SDK migration, and redesigned with a strategy pattern-based payment engine abstraction to enable easy multi-payment method expansion

Built a custom paging layer based on Riverpod Family with key caching, prefetching, and debounce strategies to resolve paging performance degradation and initial loading delays in product list queries, achieving 3-6x average and up to 10x initial performance improvement

Resolved infinite loading issue on Home API caused by external payment domain issues using local cache-based fallback structure, implementing a system that ensures data exposure during outages and re-synchronization after recovery

Eliminated computational overhead by memoization-caching image ratio calculation results during home banner rendering, improving scroll processing speed by up to 11x and enhancing home screen banner rendering performance
Designed JWT and wallet security data storage system based on flutter_secure_storage (iOS Keychain / Android Keystore)
Managed QA build deployment and internal test processes using Firebase App Distribution and TestFlight
Continuously updated features and maintained operations for services published on Google Play and App Store

cpass.title: CPASS
cpass.description: Rebuilt and launched the existing native Android app in Flutter with design renewal, chat, coin trading, and community features
cpass.fullDescription: Rebuilt and launched the existing native Android app in Flutter with design renewal, adding chat, coin trading, and community features for a complete renewal.

problemSolvings.problem: The existing native app was difficult to maintain and required separate development staff for iOS/Android, resulting in low cost-efficiency.
problemSolvings.solution: Adopted Flutter cross-platform to handle both markets with a single codebase, improving development productivity by 200%.
problemSolvings.conclusion: A successful case of transitioning legacy code to modern cross-platform technology.

problemSolvings.problem: Frequent WebSocket connection instability occurred when implementing real-time chat.
problemSolvings.solution: Implemented Socket.io along with custom reconnection logic and an offline queuing system to prevent message loss.
problemSolvings.conclusion: Acquired deep domain knowledge by re-analyzing existing business logic during the migration process.

problemSolvings.problem: Performance degradation occurred when processing large volumes of data.
problemSolvings.solution: Introduced Hive DB to optimize local data caching.
problemSolvings.conclusion: Greatly contributed to reducing maintenance costs.

achievements: Custom-built user balance (donut) and price fluctuation (line) charts using CustomPainter directly without external library dependencies
Implemented coin charging functionality by integrating the Next Pay payment system
Implemented KYC (Know Your Customer) authentication to verify user identity and strengthen security
Implemented push notification functionality using FCM (Firebase Cloud Messaging)
Designed and implemented an onboarding process consisting of welcome screens, tutorials, and tooltips for new users using mock data, guiding them through the app's key features and usage
Developed reusable chat UI components using CustomPainter and Matrix4 transformations to overcome structural limitations of implementing complex speech bubble UI with basic widget combinations
Applied multi-language support (Localization) for Korean, English, Chinese, Japanese, and multi-currency support for USD, KRW, JPY, PHP

brk.title: BRK Foundation
brk.description: Philippine NGO foundation app providing coin donation and donation amount aggregation features
brk.fullDescription: A Philippine NGO foundation app providing coin donation and donation amount aggregation features.

problemSolvings.problem: Rendering performance degradation and excessive memory usage occurred when displaying thousands of donation location data on a map simultaneously.
problemSolvings.solution: Adopted Google Maps Clustering (ClusterManager) to group markers based on zoom level, minimizing rendering load.
problemSolvings.conclusion: A project where I learned how technology can contribute to creating actual social value.

problemSolvings.problem: Data loading failures were frequent due to poor local network environments.
problemSolvings.solution: Applied Retry Interceptor to Retrofit and locally cached critical data in Room DB, implementing an Offline-First architecture.
problemSolvings.conclusion: Secured technical capability in optimizing and integrating Geographic Information Systems (GIS) into mobile apps.

problemSolvings.problem: The complex donation process needed to be simplified.
problemSolvings.solution: Streamlined the donation process step-by-step with User Experience (UX) considerations.
problemSolvings.conclusion: Experienced the importance of Offline-First architecture firsthand.

achievements: Integrated Google Maps API to provide location-based services with custom markers and clustering functionality to display donated regions
Implemented functionality to render dynamically fetched HTML content from the server naturally in the app UI using WebView with dynamic height adjustment
Implemented app launch and specific page navigation through Firebase Dynamic Links
Improved reusability and development efficiency by componentizing widgets such as buttons, snackbars, bottom sheets, text input fields, switch buttons, and dialogs
Implemented social login functionality for Google, Apple, Facebook, Line, and more

digiLab.title: DigiLab
digiLab.description: Blockchain wallet providing comprehensive coin wallet features including wallet creation, remittance, swap, and QR payment
digiLab.fullDescription: A blockchain wallet providing comprehensive coin wallet features including wallet creation, remittance, swap, and QR payment.

problemSolvings.problem: Blockchain transaction processing is asynchronous with a high probability of failure, making it difficult to provide clear feedback to users.
problemSolvings.solution: Implemented a state machine that polls asynchronous transaction status and reflects step-by-step progress in the UI in real-time.
problemSolvings.conclusion: Gained a deep understanding of the Android framework by building a fintech app requiring high security and reliability from scratch single-handedly.

problemSolvings.problem: Security requirements for safely managing private keys and mnemonic codes were extremely demanding.
problemSolvings.solution: Used Android Keystore System to encrypt and store sensitive data, and applied rooting detection and screen capture prevention.
problemSolvings.conclusion: Felt great reward in advancing the app by incorporating user feedback after launch.

problemSolvings.problem: Performance degradation was anticipated due to complex encryption logic processing.
problemSolvings.solution: Handled encryption tasks on background threads to maintain UI responsiveness.
problemSolvings.conclusion: Deeply recognized the importance of secure coding.

achievements: Integrated RESTful APIs for various coin payment processes (remittance, swap, charging, withdrawal, escrow, QR payment) into the client app
Implemented sign-up and login functionality supporting multiple authentication methods including email, PIN, biometric, Google, and Apple
Implemented duplicate login prevention using JWT tokens
Implemented robust error handling and retry logic using Retrofit and Dio interceptors
Improved code reusability and maintainability using MVVM architecture
Achievement: Built and launched a new blockchain wallet service on Google Play Store

sideProjects.title: SingTogether
sideProjects.fullDescription: A mobile app providing karaoke features.

items.name: Survey Analyst Level 2
items.organization: Human Resources Development Service of Korea
